input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('market.csv')
qids = ['34927', '390530', '534802', '953884']
for qid in qids:
    row = df[df['qid'].astype(str) == str(qid)]
    if len(row) > 0:
        r = row.iloc[0]
        print(f'Q{r[\"qid\"]}: {r[\"title\"][:130]} | Mkt: {r[\"market_aggregate\"]}')
"
